name: Aberdeen Vendor SnapShot: Snap Appliance Inc.
description: Aberdeen vendor snapshot profile of Snap Appliance Inc. (formerly Meridian Data, then Quantum subsidiary), the number-one volume NAS provider with 130,000+ unit installed base. Covers product line from workgroup (Snap Server 1100/2200) through departmental (4100/4200/4500) and enterprise (SnapServer 14000) tiers, software partnerships, and ATA-based midline storage positioning.
